titleStmt.title: SII 27.54: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 54. (A.R. No. 318 of 1931-32.) KĀḌŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the house of Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa Purāṇika at the hamlet of Tantrāḍi.

This record registers a gift of land to Kṛishṇa-maṇḍacha, son of Kēśava-maṇḍacha for feeding one brahmin daily in memory of Narisimga-biṁnāṇi, by the latter's mother Dugu-biṁnāṇitti. The gift land was situated in Antrāḍi. It states that mahāpradhāna Gōparasavoḍeya was then governing Bārakūru-rājya.
It is dated Śaka 1293, Virōdhikṛit, Āśvayuja ba. 30, solar eclipse corresponding to 1371 A.D., October 9. The weekday was Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēlinamaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāma
ra cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
jayābhyudaya śakavaruśa 1293 neya varttamāna virōdhikrutu saṁ
vatsarada Asvayuja ba 20 sūriyagrahaṇadaṁdu svastiśrī manu mahā
maṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāsege tappuvarāyara gaṁḍa
śrī vīrabukkaṁṇa voḍeyara vijayarājyābhyudayadalu Ā
bukkaṁṇa voḍeyara nirūpadiṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ gōpa
rsa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu hūvaciya
baḷiya dugubiṁnāṇitti taṁnamaga narasiṁga biṁnāṇi svargastanādalli
māḍida dharma dina 1 kaṁ voba brāhmaṇanuṁbahāge māḍidadharma Aṁtrā
ḍi voḷage tōṭada brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷu Aṇevittiya gade 1
guḷiyanagade 1 Antugade 2 kaṁ bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍuga
dali mūḍe 10 A bāḷina catusīme hoḷeIṁdaṁ baḍagalu A
gaḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu hosamāṭada gade Iṁ paḍuvalu hāyka
na baḷiyavara bāḷagaḍi Iṁdaṁ mūḍalu Iṁtu catusīme yo
ḷaguḷa bāḷu A bāḷiṁge baṁda kaṭuṁdeṟu va 6 nū narasiṁgāḷu
vana Aḷiya beṁmaṁṇa kaṁbaḷiṁguḷa teṟanū dugu biṁ
nāṇitti Ā teṟiṁge śalavāgi mākabeya beṭṭinamāki mū 5 mane
Aḍi Iṣṭanū koṭṭu teṟanū yerisikoṁḍu A teṟanū koṁḍu
koṁḍaḷu yi bāḷiṁge dugubiṁnāṇittiyū mūrukēriya halaṭhū kū
ḍidu kēśava maṁḍacana maga kriṣṇamaṁḍacaṁge nāyaru mūlavāgi Eṟa
du koṭaru Ā maṁḍacanū bānagēḍu baṟagēḍu Eṁnade nāgaṁ
ḍugadalu nilikeOtana hāneyalu bhatta mū 30 ke Akki mū 12 nū
barave Akkiyāgi bārakūriṁge taṁdu hāykuvanu yi dharmmavanu
dugubiṁnāṇitti vuḷḷaṣṭukāla dugu biṁnāṇitti naḍasuvaḷu du
gubiṁnāṇittiyaṁda baḷika dugubiṁnāṇittiya saṁtānadava
ru naḍasuvaru kriṣṇamaṁḍacana saṁtāna tappade nāyaru
mūlavāgi Eṟidu koṭṭaru I dharmma mūṟukiriya sōmanā
tha dēvara saṁnidhiyalu māḍida dharmma . I dharmmavanu mūṟukiri
ya mūvaru seṭṭikāṟarū nūṟa yattiḷa mēloḷagāda samastahala
ru pratipālisuvaru . I dharmmakke taṁtrāḍi Ūru Ayvara
pa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvarusa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi . Avanānobbaru I dharmake Aḷipidavaru
vāraṇāsiyalu 100 kavileya koṁdapāpa śrī sōmanātha saraṇu
gōparsavoḍēra suhastada 7 pa
Digital edition of SII 27.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
